form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into sixth behind Huxham Chubb at Terang over 1680m in a NR up to 45 on March 27 at $11. Then a handy effort when beaten by 2 m finishing second after showing early speed, behind Lazenby at Cranbourne over 1609m in a NR 40 to 45 on April 3 at $7.50. Has the inside and is a winning hope.

form.formComment: Last start 10th (Fr3) over 2190m at this track, beaten 75 m by Nevs Dream (2:44.80) in NR up to 46 on March 27 at $51. Two runs back was driven from back in the field when 10th (Fr3) over 1790m at this track, beaten 65 m by Rocknroll Lenny (2:12.10) in 0-3 WINs on March 20 at $31. Not keen on his chances in this line-up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Commenced to tire leaving the 400m mark to be beaten 76.0m.
Hung in after the start and restrained. Tired to be beaten 68m.

form.formComment: Didn't do much at the last run, 5th (Sr2) over 2190m at this track beaten 45 m by Maggacis (2:43.40) in NR up to 46 on March 10 at $3.90. Before that was driven from back in the field when 5th (Fr5) over 2190m after being wide early at this track beaten 35 m by Nevs Dream (2:43.30) in NR up to 44 on February 25 at $4.60. Draws for a strong showing.

form.formComment: Solid performance when a close second after a quick start, behind Diamond Krusher at this track over 1790m in a NR up to 50 on March 20 at $14. Then a handy effort when beaten by 9 m finishing second after being driven well back, behind Nevs Dream at this track over 2190m in a NR up to 46 on March 27 at $7.50. In fine form. Sure to be there at the business end.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up around the home turn and early in the home straight shifted out.
Checked and broke gait leaving the front straight on the first occasion.
Shifted out under pressure in the home straight.

form.formComment: Hard to fault of late. Last start by 6 m as favourite (Fr1) at Globe Derby Park (2:45.10) beating Didmeselfamischief in NR 44 to 49 on April 4 at $2 at the bell was 4th-6.2. Can go back-to-back.

form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 8th (Fr4) over 1790m after racing wide at this track, beaten 20 m by Shes Poppy (2:12.40) in NR 47 to 51 on March 27 at $8.50. Two runs back 3rd (Sr1) over 1790m at this track, at the bell was 5th-11.4 beaten 4.5 m by Diamond Krusher (2:12.10) in NR up to 50 on March 20 at $9.50. Can play a role.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced erratically at various stages of the event.
Tired to be beaten 58m into 5th placing.
Held up for clear running during the early stages of the run to the finish.
Checked and sulky contacted by Diamond Krusher at approx 1100m.

form.formComment: Last start 7th (Fr2) over 1790m at this track, at the bell was 4th-6.6 beaten 19 m by Shes Poppy (2:12.40) in NR 47 to 51 on March 27 at $3.90. At his previous start 11th (Fr5) over 2190m after racing wide at this track well beaten by Wicked Confession (2:39.50) in NR 45 to 50 on February 25 at $26. Capable of bouncing back.
